description: Composition Black hooded sweatshirt made of 80% cotton and 20% polyester, has a hood with drawstrings, long sleeves with ribbed cuffs made of 97% cotton and 3% spandex, two insert pockets with asymmetric openings, ribbed panels on the sides, and embroidered brand swoosh on the left chest Fitting Regular Wash care Machine wash warm with like colours Do not bleach or dry clean Tumble dry low Warm iron; Do not iron on decorations Enjoy the winter with this fabulous sweatshirt from puma. The ribbed panels on the sides are a refreshing addition to this winter staple, while the thick fabric provides lightweight comfort and warmth. The white swoosh logo gives you a strong sporty edge. Layer over long sleeved tees, jeans or tracks and sports shoes. Model statistics Product is a size M on a model of height 6', chest 39" and shoulders 18"
